title: Back At It
excerpt: After days of rain (I really might need to join a gym again) and some excuses, I am finally back at Mile A Day . At 7:15am the air was brisk, but dang did it feel good.
body: After days of rain (I really might need to join a gym again) and some excuses, I am finally back at Mile A Day. At 7:15am the air was brisk, but dang did it feel good.
